3GPP_Reference.Title: 5G; NG-RAN; F1 Application Protocol (F1AP), 5G; NG-RAN; Architecture description

Feature_Description: The Inter-gNB-DU LTM (L1/L2 Triggered Mobility) handover procedure is used when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation. This procedure involves the gNB-CU initiating the UE Context Setup procedure with a candidate gNB-DU to prepare for the LTM handover.

The UE Context Setup procedure's purpose is to establish the UE Context including, among others, SRB, DRB, BH RLC channel, Uu Relay RLC channel, PC5 Relay RLC channel, and SL DRB configuration. If no UE-associated logical F1-connection exists, it shall be established as part of the procedure.
Feature_Objectives: To enable seamless mobility of a UE between different gNB-DUs under the same gNB-CU using L1/L2 Triggered Mobility (LTM).
To establish the UE context and necessary radio bearer configurations in the candidate gNB-DU for the LTM handover.
To facilitate early synchronization and LTM configuration exchange between the gNB-CU and candidate gNB-DU.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 1. The UE sends a MeasurementReport message (L3 measurement result) to the source gNB-DU containing measurements of neighbouring cells. The source gNB-DU sends an UL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER message conveying the received MeasurementReport message to the gNB-CU.
2. The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration.

3. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

4. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.

Code_Instructions.description: Data structure defining the format and Information Elements (IEs) of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message. This is crucial for constructing the message on the gNB-CU side and parsing it on the gNB-DU side.

Data structure defining the format and Information Elements (IEs) of the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message. This is essential for constructing the response on the gNB-DU side and parsing it on the gNB-CU side.

A helper function likely responsible for encoding or preparing the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message for transmission, potentially handling the interface between the RRC layer and the F1AP protocol stack for downlink messages.

This function is a building block for generating the RRC-specific content and configurations (e.g., SRB, DRB, RLC channel configurations) that will be included as Information Elements within the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message.

A helper function likely responsible for decoding or processing the received F1AP UE Context Setup Response message, extracting relevant information for the RRC layer and handling the interface for uplink messages.

Information_Elements.IE_Definition: The complete ASN.1 definition for UEContextSetupRequestIEs is not available in the provided context. It is a container for various IEs, including those related to LTM.
The complete ASN.1 definition for LTMInformationSetupIE is not available in the provided context. It is used to convey LTM setup information.
The complete ASN.1 definition for LTMConfigurationIDMappingListIE is not available in the provided context. It provides mapping information for LTM candidate cell(s).
The complete ASN.1 definition for EarlySyncInformationRequestIE is not available in the provided context. It is used to request early TA acquisition information.
The complete ASN.1 definition for SpCellIDIE is not available in the provided context. It identifies the SpCell for which LTM is requested.
The complete ASN.1 definition for LTMIndicatorIE is not available in the provided context. It indicates whether the request concerns LTM.

The complete ASN.1 definition for ReferenceConfigurationIE is not available in the provided context. It is contained within LTMInformationSetupIE and may include request for or provision of lower layer configuration.
The complete ASN.1 definition for CSIResourceConfigurationIE is not available in the provided context. It is used to generate LTM CSI reporting configuration(s).
The complete ASN.1 definition for RequestForLowerLayerConfigurationIE is not available in the provided context. When set to 'true', it requests the gNB-DU to provide lower layer configuration.

The complete ASN.1 definition for ReferenceConfigurationInformationIE is not available in the provided context. It provides the lower layer configuration for generating the LTM reference configuration.
The complete ASN.1 definition for UEContextSetupResponseIEs is not available in the provided context. It is a container for various IEs, including those related to LTM.
The complete ASN.1 definition for LTMConfigurationIE is not available in the provided context. It conveys the generated configuration for LTM from the accepted candidate cell.
The complete ASN.1 definition for EarlySyncInformationIE is not available in the provided context. It contains information for early TA acquisition (early UL synchronisation).
The complete ASN.1 definition for RequestedTargetCellIDIE is not available in the provided context. It indicates the target cell ID requested by the gNB-CU.

The complete ASN.1 definition for CompleteCandidateConfigurationIndicatorIE is not available in the provided context. When set to 'complete', it indicates that the LTM candidate configuration is a complete candidate configuration.
The complete ASN.1 definition for EarlyULSyncConfigurationIE is not available in the provided context. It contains the generated early UL sync information from the accepted candidate cell.

The complete ASN.1 definition for EarlyULSyncConfigurationForSULIE is not available in the provided context. It contains the generated early UL sync information for SUL from the accepted candidate cell.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: The context mentions RRCReconfiguration message being included in DL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER and RRCReconfigurationComplete in UL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER. These are RRC messages piggy-backed in F1AP messages during the LTM procedure.
